agent_dn.description: 3CX agent extension. Composite primary key with queue_dn and period.

answered_count.description: Number of calls this agent answered for this queue in the period.

answered_percent.description: Percentage of calls offered to this agent that were answered.

logged_in_time_seconds.description: Total time this agent was logged into the queue during the period.

lost_count.description: Calls that rang this agent but were not answered (abandoned, timed out, redirected).
